titleStmt.title: SII 30.261: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 261. (A.R. No. 613 of 1915.) Teṉmalai, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Tripuranāthēśvara temple-on the east wall of the Śivaparipūraṇi shrine Jat. Vīra-Pāṇḍya: year 6, Kanyā 13, ba. di. 7, Wednesday, Mrigaśīrsha: 1259 A.D., Wednesday, Sep. 10

summary.p: It registers the sale of land near Sundara-Pāṇḍyap-pērēri for the amount of two achchu by the mahāsabhā of Śri Sundara-Pāṇḍyach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Āri-nāḍu as kuḍinīṅgākārāṇmai to meet out the requirements of the goddess who was known as Śivaṉaimuḻudumuḍaiya-nāchchiyār. This goddess was consecrated in the temple of Tiruppāttīśvaramuḍaiya nāyanār by certain Tiruvāṉaikkāvuḍaiyān Udayadivākaraṉ alias Vēnāḍuḍaiyāṉ, a native of Kūhūr in Vaḍaveḷḷāṟu alias Sundarapāṇḍya-vaḷanāḍu. As a northern boundary of the above said land, one tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam land belonging to the Tirumaḻisai viṇṇagar Emperumāṉ is mentained. Sundarapāṇḍya mūvēndavēḷaṉ figures as the accountant of the sabhā.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī matki] ttikku melk koccaṭaiyapaṉmarā
ṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cirivirapāṇṭi
ya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 6 vatu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu patiṉ
muṉṟān tiyatiyum Aparapakkattu sap(pi)tami
yum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mirukaciriṣa
ttunāḷ Ārināṭṭu piramatecam cunta
[rapāṇṭi caturvvetimaṅkalattu mahā]
sapaiyom Iṉṉāṭṭu śrī ṭaiya
r tiruppāttiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyi
lil vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷa
nāṭṭu kūkūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭai
yāṉ Utayativākaraṉāṉa veṇāṭuṭaiyāṉ Eḻun
taruḷuvitta tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu civaṉai
muḻutumuṭai nācciyāṟku piṭipāṭu paṇṇik
kuṭutta paricāvatu Ivveṇāṭuṭaiyārkku kuṭiniṅ
kā kārāṇmaiyāka viṟṟa nilattukku Ellai
yāvatu cuntarapāṇṭiyapererik kiḻ
kālukku teṟku
tiruvaraṅkattukku meṟku Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu
Añcāñ ceyyilum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu A
ñcāñ ceyyilu mel varampukku meṟku te
ṉṉellai Eḻāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Āṟāñcey
yyilum vaṭavara
mpu peṟṟa te
vvaikku va
ṭakkum melel
lai karaikku kiḻa
kkum vaṭavellai
tirumoḻicai viṇ
ṇakaremperumāṉ
tiruviṭaiyāṭṭat
tukku teṟkum Āka I
ṉṉāṉkellaikku
ṭpaṭṭa nilamum mara
muṅ kiṇaṟum nattamu
maṟṟum Eppeṟpa
ṭṭa ṟkku vi
lai niccayitta Accu
Iraṇṭu Ivaccu Ira
ṇṭukkum Ivve
ṇāṭuṭaiyārkku ku
ṭiniṅkākārāṇ
maiyāka Inā
cciyār civanāmattukku viṟṟu vilai
ppiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom makācapaiyom
Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Iṉṉilattukku kaṭamai viṉiyo
kam poṉvari Uṭpaṭṭa maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaika
ḷum Eṅkaḷurile Ēṟpakkoṇṭu Innācciyār tirukkai
malarile Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāki nirvārttuk kuṭutta�
kkum Iṉṉilam Eṅkaḷuril niṉṟumiṟaṅkaṭṭu Uṭai
yār tiruppātticcuravamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉattoṭe
kūṭṭiṉamaikkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlakka
llu nāṭṭik kuṭuttamaikku Iṉṉilattukku niriñcu
pāyu maṭaikaḷāl nirpāccikkoḷḷac coṉṉamaikkum
Ippaṭi cammatittu piṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭuttom makā
capaiyom tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu civaṉaimuḻutuṭaiya
nācciyārkku Ivai pākaḷur Iḷaiyavilli Eḻuttu puḷḷuma
ṅkalattu cikaruṇṇaṉ Eḻuttu kuṇṭur Āḻvāṉpaṭṭaṉ E
ḻuttu Irāyūr Āḻvāṉeḻuttu Ivai pākaḷur colaippi
rāṉ paṭṭaṉeḻuttu vaṟṟalūr Iṭarko ṉeḻuttu
vaiyakam Āḻvāṉeḻuttu pākaḷurnampi Eḻuttu kāram
piceṭṭu kolavāmaṉaṉ Eḻuttu Ippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉe
ṉ capaikkaṇakku cuntarapāṇṭiya muventaveḷāṉ
Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 30.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
